name: Calamari
description: 360° feedback, self-assessments, and AI-assisted review summaries — part of an HR platform with Slack and Microsoft 365 integration. Learn more about Calamari

reviews.review_pros: We have gained terrific and attentive service from their team. The product does what it needs to do and they have it applied the personal service we need to have success with all the different variables for which we need to account.
reviews.review_cons: At this time, I don't have a particular point on which to focus. We have been using this service for some time and have seen it continue to improve such that there are not any points that immediately come to mind as my liking least.

reviews.review_description: It's a useful tool helping in everyday office work as a administrator and easy tool for user to control their working ours and holidays.
reviews.review_pros: user friendly, easy, readable for user. Multiple options. We use it only to count the working hours and to control do holidays, absences - For these to the price is affordable.
reviews.review_cons: reports. To many options showing very little data. No reports showing activities filtered by projects. Few errors happening from time to time

reviews.review_description: Comsi comsa
reviews.review_pros: Everyone in Greece is sarcastic and loughs when he/she hears your brand name.
reviews.review_cons: Absense, time management, breaks control

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Calamari offers a highly positive experience for users, characterized by its friendly and intuitive interface. The platform is designed to be user-friendly, making it easy for employees and managers to navigate and utilize its features effectively. One of the standout aspects of Calamari is its seamless integration with other solutions. Calamari integrates smoothly, enhancing productivity and streamlining workflows. The only thing missing is for the notes to be assigned in the reports.
reviews.review_pros: a plug-in in the Teams application that allows you to add presence without going into additional applications
reviews.review_cons: extracting information, creating reports without taking notes into account. In our case, this is crucial

reviews.review_description: It has been an excellent experience, our rep, [sensitive content hidden], is amazing! she is very responsive and super helpful.
reviews.review_pros: The adaptability of their platform to the business is amazing, and the customer care experience is top of the line.
reviews.review_cons: The change in plan originally included the birthdays, but later, they were excluded from the plan, and we can't have visibility.

reviews.review_title: A solid leave management tool with clear advantages over competitors, but still room for improvement
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Before using Calamari, we worked with a tool called Vacation Tracker, but it did not allow calendar sharing or include an approval workflow. After evaluating several tools, Calamari proved to be much better, although there is still room for improvement.
reviews.review_pros: It allows me to manage vacations and paid or unpaid leave in a single portal.
reviews.review_cons: It did not allow me to block certain dates to prevent employees from requesting vacation during peak work periods, but it did allow them to request sick leave, which is not something that can be controlled.

reviews.review_description: Calamari is fantastic. Automating PTO tracking has improved our HR a great deal and eliminated the horrible task of manual tracking from my desk and from my mind.
reviews.review_pros: Reasonable price, easy for employees to use, works consistently, solid integrations. It works better for us than higher priced alternatives.
reviews.review_cons: PTO policy setup is a bit funky in the user interface and difficult to do, but they can help with that if you ask. Schedule setup is also strange, but my org is nearly all salary anyway.

reviews.review_title: Calamari saved us hours every week
reviews.review_description: Switching to Calamari was one of the best decisions we made this year. We used to manage time off in spreadsheets, which was chaotic and error-prone. Now everything is centralized, transparent, and automated. Our team loves how easy it is to check their leave balance or request time off. I love how much time I save on approvals and reporting. The modular pricing also means we only pay for what we need. Highly recommended for any growing company.
reviews.review_pros: The implementation was surprisingly quick – we were up and running in just a few days. The Slack integration is a game-changer for our remote team; people can request time off without leaving their workflow. The interface is clean and intuitive, so we didn't need to spend time training employees. Plus, the support team is incredibly responsive and helpful whenever we have questions.
reviews.review_cons: Honestly, we haven't encountered any major issues. At first, I wished there were more customization options for reports, but the team actually added some of those features based on feedback.

reviews.review_description: Calamari.io is a solid solution for companies focused on leave and attendance management. While it’s not a full HR platform, it also delivers strong value for businesses that prioritize time-off tracking and team coordination.
reviews.review_pros: I am using the Team Management feature. Calamari excels in managing time-off requests, approvals, and tracking. The automated notifications and calendar integrations reduce manual work significantly.
reviews.review_cons: Pricing is fair for small to mid-sized teams, but larger organizations might find the cost high relative to the feature set.

reviews.review_description: We have been using Calamaria in our company for quite some time now and we are very satisfied. The system is intuitive, transparent and significantly improves absence management — both for employees and the HR department.
reviews.review_pros: Booking a holiday takes just a few clicks, and the entire company has a real-time overview of who is absent and when.
reviews.review_cons: I have reservations about the configuration of holiday limits. In my opinion, this area is not very intuitive and quite complicated, especially with more complex rules (e.g. different types of contracts, proportional calculation, transfer of unused days). It requires a lot of testing and careful checking of settings to ensure that everything works correctly.

reviews.review_description: It is clear and user friendly. I think we are lacking come ideas how to use it more fully. Also, some reports could be possible to export to give it directly for the accountants.
reviews.review_pros: Possibilities to adapt to ones' needs. Good and clearly understandable calendar.
reviews.review_cons: More smooth integrations with Google callendar and email. When one need to aplly for permission to leave, you cannot see the overall callender. Also, with students, who are wiorking not full time and dont have reggular shedule, you need to create

reviews.review_title: Excellent software, low price points fills a niche in the market
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: This is great software for which I am grateful. My organization couldn’t afford their competitors, so Calamari met a need. My life is far simplified and my employees are happier thanks to Calamari.
reviews.review_pros: The quality of Calamari is great, while being far less expensive than its competitors. My employees have had little trouble getting set up. Their customer service is also HIGHLY responsive and helpful.
reviews.review_cons: The UI is not perfect. For time off tracking it is sufficient, but for time tracking it is tricky to figure out. I only have one employee who even might have used it, so we opted not to pay for that feature.

reviews.review_description: We have been using the Calamari time tracking system in our company for about seven years now, and our experience has been extremely positive. The system has proven to be reliable and flexible for everyday time tracking, as well as for managing vacations and absences. One of the key advantages for us is that the platform is in English, making it ideal for our international work environment. Additionally, the mobile version is very user-friendly, which makes logging hours on the go or while working remotely simple and efficient. The setup process was smooth, and the system has remained up-to-date thanks to regular updates. Overall, Calamari has been a dependable and easy-to-use solution that we highly recommend to other companies.
reviews.review_pros: Mobile version is very handy to use and English version is always needed when working in international environment
reviews.review_cons: One thing to improve is, that you be able to change person working hours from example from full-time to part time, and system can track those correctly.

reviews.review_description: I use it for over 2,5 yrs now and I am happy to have it. I don't have to explain much how to use it during Onboarding process as the interface is very clear.
reviews.review_pros: Simple, clear, intuitive. I also like the graphics and colours (not too intense). Integration with google platform jest great.
reviews.review_cons: Before updates it was hard to find some functions. I think it would be useful if a function (role) of person is changed received a notification.

reviews.review_description: I believe it has helped us and the staff immensely, as we never had this system in place before. Previously all annual leave was put on a shared calender.
reviews.review_pros: Booking holidays, sick leave, WFH and overtime is very easy. Getting support from the guys at Calamari is fantastic!
reviews.review_cons: I prefer logging into Calamari via my pc. The Calamari app is not as easy to use or view when compared to using the website.

reviews.review_description: Customer service is amazing, we are very happy with this system, ive never found anything else comparible.
reviews.review_pros: We have been using calamari for several years and continue to do so. We love it, it helps to keep us organized!
reviews.review_cons: I haven't run into anything using this system that I dislike. It provides everything that we need it for.

reviews.review_pros: Calamari can be a little overwhelming at first (especially with no HR background), but once you got the hang of it it's a great tool. We use it for our business all the time. Had to ask the helpdesk some questions at several points in time and was helped really well (big ups to [sensitive content hidden]!)
reviews.review_cons: Nothing bad to say about the system. We like everything it provides. Only good words from our side :)

reviews.review_title: Geat application for all kinds of companies
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: I use from two months and start use in the secend organization. The Calamari is very effective and support all needs.
reviews.review_pros: Easy to operating with all parameters and options. Mobile application is very easy to start use and employes was exited when start with Calamari.
reviews.review_cons: Import data from other application, but people from Calamari were very helpful and help us to fix this case.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: i m using calamari and i like the possibility to personalize according to my needs; i like very much that it is converted to excel
reviews.review_pros: the reactivity of Calamari team when we send a request by email; they are very helpful, and i love the videos they send to explain how to proceed; very practical
reviews.review_cons: i don't like receiving everyday an email from Calamari about the presence it fills my inbox and is not relevant.

reviews.review_description: One of the best client experience I have ever had. I recommend this tool to facilite any HR department.
reviews.review_pros: Calamari can be used for any country and any HR situations. Very helpful when you have several companies all over the world or when you need to adapt to some context.
reviews.review_cons: [sensitive content hidden] just the fact that you cannot re-arrange the interface views.

reviews.review_description: A good experience for years. It's constantly evolving and adding new features that makes easy the overall experience.
reviews.review_pros: multiplatform integration: IOS, Mac, Teams, Windows, Web, Bluetooth ...
reviews.review_cons: a Bulk system to review bad entries. Some coworkers are very bad at sign in to Calamari, and the administration people has to change one by one.

reviews.review_description: Great customer support when experience some difficulty.
reviews.review_pros: Easy to use after setting up. No issues whatsoever.
reviews.review_cons: Some settings could be confusing to use especially when setting the accrual.

reviews.review_description: Very easy to setup and use for leaves management.
reviews.review_pros: - Slack integration is very good - Leaves approval and request method is very easy - Calendar integration is very good
reviews.review_cons: - It is not possible to share a list of public holidays

reviews.review_description: so far so good, like the customiseable, easyier to use
reviews.review_pros: Multiplatform, integraton into Outlook, customised "holiday type"
reviews.review_cons: no hungarian language, and some of my colleagues are not confident wit it report is a not good looking and easy understand.

reviews.review_description: Great! Calamari has been perfect for a small not for profit organization working with a diverse team across many timezones.
reviews.review_pros: Simple to onboard new staff and manage a variety of work flows and staff types.
reviews.review_cons: There could be improvements made in moving year to year - particularly in setting up standard holiday schedules.
